title: store.rs get_categories has no LIMIT — unbounded category list per space
description: store.rs get_categories: fetches all category rows for a space with no LIMIT. Categories are not paginated anywhere in the JMAP layer. A space with many categories returns all of them. This is lower severity than messages/contacts because categories are admin-created, but there is no cap enforced at insert time either. Scenario: space with thousands of categories; any Space/get or Category operation loads all into memory.
